candidates.title: M. Antoninus Imperator Ad Se Ipsum (Leopold 1908 source edition)
candidates.description: Internet Archive scan of the Leopold 1908 Teubner edition used by Perseus
candidates.quality_notes: Page images of the print source. Note: Perseus indicates some pages are missing in this scan. HathiTrust alternative: https://hdl.handle.net/2027/uc1.b3218103
candidates.confidence_notes: Reference value: useful for verification but Perseus TEI is primary source
candidates.notes: Fallback for verification only; Perseus XML is preferred

candidates.title: Treebank availability search
candidates.description: No treebank data found for Marcus Aurelius Meditations in Perseus AGDT2 or PROIEL
candidates.quality_notes: Marcus Aurelius (Imperial-era philosophical prose) is not covered in existing Ancient Greek treebank projects, which focus on Classical authors and New Testament Greek
candidates.confidence_notes: Confirmed absence: checked Perseus treebank_data and PROIEL repositories
candidates.notes: Morphological analysis will need to rely on computational tools (morpheus, greek-nlp-toolkit) rather than gold-standard treebank annotations

candidates.title: C.R. Haines Loeb translation (1916) search
candidates.description: Loeb Classical Library translation by C.R. Haines (1916) not readily found in digital form
candidates.quality_notes: Published 1916, should be public domain in US (pre-1928) but not found in Gutenberg or other standard repositories. May require library access.
candidates.confidence_notes: Not available: not found in standard PD repositories; Long translation is superior choice anyway
candidates.notes: Not pursued further; George Long (1862) is the preferred scholarly translation
